---
title: "26 May 2026: Currently working"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-05-26"
categories: [week_notes]
---

Meeting note: “how much weirdness do we want to standardise?”.....

Meeting note: “playing whackamole with getting the plain text transcripts together”....

Meeting note: “called time on prepping the text”...
